error.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked. Please try again in a few minutes.
error.networkRequired: First login on this device requires a network connection.
error.deviceRevoked: This device has been revoked. Online login required.
error.offlineExpired: Offline login window expired. Online login required.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

logout.label: Sign out
logout.confirm: Do you want to sign out?

expired.title: Session expired
expired.message: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

idleLocked.title: Session locked
idleLocked.message: Your session is locked due to inactivity.

forcePasswordChange.title: Password change required
forcePasswordChange.message: You must set a new password before continuing.

pin.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please use your password.

session.title: Session interrupted
session.message: For your security, we’ve paused the app. Sign in again to continue without losing your place.

permission.title: Action not permitted
permission.message: Your account can’t perform this action. If you think this is a mistake, sign in again or ask an administrator.

generic.title: Access interrupted
generic.message: We’ve temporarily paused the app. Sign in again to continue safely.

stepUp.title: Identity confirmation required
stepUp.message: This is a sensitive action. Enter your password to confirm.

device.revokeConfirm: Offline access for this device will be removed. Continue?

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized Access
unauthorized.message: You do not have the necessary permissions to access this page.

lockout.title: Account Locked
lockout.message: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
lockout.adminUnlock: Contact an administrator to unlock your account.
